pour.example: Please pour me a glass of water.

powder.example: Mix the powder with warm water.

practical.example: She gave me some practical advice.
practical.example_zh: 她給了我一些實用的建議。

precious.example_zh: 與家人相處的時光很寶貴。

preparation.example_zh: 充分的準備能帶來成功。

presence.example: Her presence made everyone feel calm.
presence.example_zh: 她的在場讓大家感到平靜。

pretend.example: The children pretended to be pirates.

previous.example: I learned this in the previous lesson.

probable.example: It is probable that he will win.

process.example: Learning a language is a slow process.
process.example_zh: 學習語言是個緩慢的過程。
這家工廠加工新鮮水果。

producer.example: The producer made a popular movie.
producer.example_zh: 那位製作人拍了一部受歡迎的電影。

producer.example: Brazil is a big coffee producer.
producer.example_zh: 巴西是咖啡的主要產地。

professor.example: The professor teaches history at college.
professor.example_zh: 那位教授在大學教歷史。

profit.example: The shop made a good profit this year.
We can profit from his experience.
profit.example_zh: 我們能從他的經驗中獲益。

promote.example: They promote healthy eating at school.

pronounce.example: Can you pronounce this word correctly?
pronounce.example_zh: 你能正確地唸出這個字嗎？

proof.example: Do you have any proof of what you say?
proof.example_zh: 你有任何證據證明你說的話嗎？

protection.example: A helmet gives protection to your head.

pub.example: They met friends at the pub after work.
pub.example_zh: 他們下班後在酒吧和朋友碰面。

pump.example: He used a pump to fill the tire.
pump.example_zh: 他用打氣筒替輪胎打氣。

pump.example: The heart pumps blood around the body.
pump.example_zh: 心臟把血液輸送到全身。

punch.example: He punched the wall in anger.
punch.example_zh: 他憤怒地一拳打在牆上。

punch.example: The boxer threw a hard punch.
punch.example_zh: 拳擊手揮出重重的一拳。

puppet.example: The children watched a puppet show.
puppet.example_zh: 孩子們看了一場木偶戲。

purse.example: She put her keys in her purse.

queer.example: There was a queer smell in the room.
queer.example_zh: 房間裡有股奇怪的味道。

quit.example: He quit his job to start a business.

quote.example: She quoted a line from the poem.
The builder gave us a quote.
quote.example_zh: 建商給了我們一份報價。

racial.example: We should treat people of every racial group fairly.
racial.example_zh: 我們應該公平對待各族群的人。

rag.example: He wiped the floor with an old rag.
rag.example_zh: 他用一塊舊抹布擦地板。

rank.example: She holds a high rank in the army.
The team ranks first in the league.
rank.example_zh: 這支隊伍在聯盟中排名第一。

rate.example: The success rate of the plan is high.
rate.example_zh: 這個計畫的成功率很高。

rate.example: Users rate the app five stars.
rate.example_zh: 使用者給這個應用程式五顆星。

ray.example: A ray of sunlight came through the window.
ray.example_zh: 一道陽光從窗戶照進來。

razor.example: He shaved with a sharp razor.
razor.example_zh: 他用鋒利的刮鬍刀刮鬍子。

react.example: She reacted quickly to the danger.
react.example_zh: 她對危險迅速做出反應。

reaction.example_zh: 他的反應讓大家很驚訝。

reasonable.example: The price seems reasonable to me.
reasonable.example_zh: 這價格對我來說很合理。

receipt.example: Please keep the receipt for the return.

receiver.example: She picked up the phone receiver.
The receiver of the letter was surprised.

recognize.example: I didn't recognize you with short hair.
recognize.example_zh: 你剪短髮我都認不出來了。
他的才華終於得到認可。

recorder.example: He used a recorder to save the interview.
She plays the recorder in music class.

rectangle.example: A door has the shape of a rectangle.

reduce.example: We should reduce the amount of trash.

regional.example: This dish is a regional specialty.
regional.example_zh: 這道菜是當地的特色料理。

regret.example: She left the town with regret.
regret.example_zh: 她帶著不捨離開了小鎮。

relax.example: She relaxes by listening to music.

release.example: The bird was released back into the wild.
The band released a new song.

reliable.example: He is a reliable friend you can trust.
reliable.example_zh: 他是個值得信賴的可靠朋友。

relief.example: It was a relief to hear the good news.
relief.example_zh: 聽到好消息真令人鬆了一口氣。

religious.example_zh: 他們舉行了一場宗教儀式。

rely.example: You can rely on me for help.
rely.example_zh: 需要幫忙你可以依靠我。

remain.example: Few people remained after the show.
remain.example_zh: 表演結束後留下來的人很少。

remind.example: Please remind me to call her.

remote.example: They live in a remote mountain village.

replace.example: We need to replace the old computer.
replace.example_zh: 我們需要更換那台舊電腦。

represent.example: She will represent our school in the contest.
represent.example_zh: 她將代表我們學校參賽。

representative.example_zh: 這是個有代表性的例子。
